creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #5)
It builds fine on 10.4 amd64/i386 and 11.1 amd64/i386 with 2018Q1 ports tree, build logs available here:
http://mikael.urankar.free.fr/FreeBSD/arm/build_logs/openblas-0.2.20_1_104amd64-2018Q1.log
http://mikael.urankar.free.fr/FreeBSD/arm/build_logs/openblas-0.2.20_1_104i386-2018Q1.log
http://mikael.urankar.free.fr/FreeBSD/arm/build_logs/openblas-0.2.20_1_111amd64-2018Q1.log
http://mikael.urankar.free.fr/FreeBSD/arm/build_logs/openblas-0.2.20_1_111i386-2018Q1.log

The problem arose with the clang6 update.
